subcodes.first_line: O blessed leaves, handmaidens of the All-Merciful, and loved ones of the Lord God! I entreat and beseech on behalf of Sakínih Sulṭán [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقات مبارکه و اماء رحمان و احبای حضرت یزدان سکینه سلطانرا خواهش و رجا
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @power of prayer, @prayer for women, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @love and unity
